text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhhh! N-now I have to turn left! Come on,
steering wheel, turn faster! Fasteeeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ugh... This is so difficult... I guess it isn't called Demon Mode! Hot Rod Racing for nothing!
choice_data_list: That was a pretty big crash.
That was a pretty big crash.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Pretend you didn't see that...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Still, being in a car inside a game sure is different
from being in one in real life! I'm not getting
motion sick at all while playing this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Maruzen said she's really good at racing
games! So even if I'm hopeless when it comes to
real cars...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to practice a lot so I can race around in a
sports car with her in this game!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I will! All right! Time for me to become the best
racer ever!

Mwahaha! Don't make me laugh! It'll be a trillion
years before you're the best racer ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Boasting seven top scores in racing games and
ten high scores in rhythm games, it's none other
than the great, the mighty... Me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: As the strongest racer of Demon Mode! Hot Rod Racing, I challenge you to a showdown, Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I won't lose that easily, especially not when it
comes to something related to hot rods!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Teio! I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, pedal to the metal right from the start!
Zooooom!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Y-your cornering is amazing! Even so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I know an even wilder driver than this! That's
right. Maruzen's driving is mind-blowing enough
to give you goosebumps!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I-I think it goes like... this! M-maybe?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! Wh-what are you doing?! You won't be
able to turn if you go that fa—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...You made the turn?! That wasn't you just losing
control of your car?! Grrr! Wait for meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Teio
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I won! Well? What do you think of the
power of the exalted Teio?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her incredible feat on that tight turn,
Sakura Chiyono O is still lacking in overall skills,
and Tokai Teio wins by a landslide.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
H-hey... You were pretty good, you know! That
reckle—er, bold driving style of yours will
certainly serve you well! A-ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You flew like the wind, Teio! The tires of your car
were practically floating off the track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And look at my time! I broke my record by ten
whole seconds! I feel like I'm getting closer to
Maruzen's speed!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Yeah! The real thrill of games is trying
new things and seeing what sticks!
choice_data_list: Seems you've found yourself an arcade buddy.
Seems you've found yourself an arcade buddy.
You should ask for a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Yeah! The real thrill of games is trying
new things and seeing what sticks!
choice_data_list: Seems you've found yourself an arcade buddy.
Seems you've found yourself an arcade buddy.
You should ask for a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Arcade buddies! I like that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Chiyono O! Wanna play a rhythm game
next?! I really like those too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A rhythm game?! S-sure! My dad likes music, so
I've actually played a little guitar before...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A-a rematch?! But I'm still not good enough to
beat her...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about that? Let's do it! Besides, no
matter how many rematches we do, you'll never
defeat me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Even the roots of a tree battle the soil!" Yeah... If
I don't do battle, I'll never improve!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're on, Teio! I challenge you to a rematch!
You may claim to be invincible, but I'm going to
catch up to you... and then surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... An unlikely friendship, but one that is sure
to be beneficial to them both. What a
heartwarming sight to see.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Shhh! We don't want to intrude on their adorable
little play date. Let's just watch over them. Ooh,
they're as cute as buttons! ♪

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Teio
text_block_list.text: All right... You're going down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them enjoy their game with wide
smiles, oblivious to all the people watching them
quietly.
